note: Log every trip's result here - kept fish AND blanks. The pattern engine learns which conditions actually produce for YOU and flags days that match your past success. The more you log, the smarter the forecast. Your other repo can append to this file. Set "example": true on rows the engine should ignore.

schema.n: number of fish (0 for a blank)

catches.note: EXAMPLE ROW - replace with your own. Dawn popper bite on the canyon edge.
